description: Transform the static HR document '/home/ga/Documents/onboarding_draft.odt' into an interactive digital form. Add text boxes for 'Full Name' and 'Job Title', a date field for 'Start Date', mutually exclusive option buttons for 'Full-Time' and 'Part-Time', and a check box for 'Company Laptop Required?'. Save the completed interactive form as '/home/ga/Documents/onboarding_form_interactive.odt'.
